steps.title: Identify the defining detail of Bellini's role
steps.content: The notes state that Bellini is “known for his research on solar and geoneutrinos” — this specific research focus is the defining detail of his role in neutrino research.

steps.title: Find the answer that specifies his role
steps.content: Choice A directly states that Bellini “worked to advance the scientific understanding of neutrinos through his research on solar and geoneutrinos,” connecting him to the specific research focus that defines his role. Choices B and C don't mention Bellini at all, and choice D names him but only uses the generic phrase “particle physics research” without the solar and geoneutrino specificity. That matches choice A — A is correct.
